outcomesSection.title: 7 Lessons: From Employee to AI Leader

outcomes.title: Tools → Strategy
outcomes.desc: Understand how AI helps companies make money, save costs, and improve efficiency. Transform from an operator to a strategy designer.

outcomes.desc: Build Marketing AI workflows, automate documents and reports, and establish data analysis and decision-making frameworks.

outcomes.title: Employee → Indispensable
outcomes.desc: Complete a real AI MVP project, negotiate with results, and become someone the company cannot afford to lose.

curriculumSection.title: From Learning AI to Leading AI Transformation
curriculumSection.subtitle: Build MVP Portfolio · Gain CEO Network · Become Your Company's AI Lead

curriculum.title: AI Mindset + Tool Mastery
curriculum.subtitle: Lessons 1-4
curriculum.desc:
Focus: Using AI to help companies make money/save time

Content: Common tools, enterprise implementation (Marketing/Operations), problem-solving frameworks

Outcome: Develop your personal AI proposal
learn: How AI helps companies make money/save costs/improve efficiency
Data analysis and decision framework building

curriculum.title: MVP Practice
curriculum.subtitle: Lessons 5-6
curriculum.desc:
Focus: From 'thinking' to 'doing'

Content: Transform proposals into MVPs, simulate scenarios, mentor-guided optimization

Outcome: Complete a demonstrable real project
learn: Transform AI proposals into feasible MVPs

curriculum.title: Executive Presentation 🔥
curriculum.subtitle: Lesson 7
curriculum.desc:
Focus: Real 'face-to-face with the boss' experience

Content: Presentation methods that impress bosses, student MVP showcase, CEO/MD feedback session

Outcome: Exposure opportunities, job change/partnership opportunities
learn: Showcasing results in front of real CEO/MD
